scenarios.description: load() with empty .env file and default systemProperties=false processes zero entries and returns DotenvImpl
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary directory with an empty .env file; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a DotenvImpl whose entries(filter null) contains only current system environment variables and no file entries
pseudocode: TEST TC01 load empty file default

scenarios.description: load() with one valid entry in .env and default systemProperties=false processes one entry
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary .env file containing a single line KEY=VALUE; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a DotenvImpl whose get("KEY") returns "VALUE" and entries(filter non-null) contains exactly one file entry

scenarios.description: load() with multiple entries in .env and default systemProperties=false processes multiple entries
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary .env file with three valid key-value lines; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a DotenvImpl whose entries(filter non-null).size() == 3 and each key maps to its value

scenarios.description: load() with systemProperties=true skips setting System properties in builder and returns normally
scenarios.precondition: Create a temporary .env file with KEY=VAL; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a DotenvImpl whose get("KEY") returns "VAL" and System.getProperty("KEY") remains null

scenarios.description: load() with missing .env file and default throwIfMissing=true throws DotenvException
scenarios.precondition: Use a directory without a .env file present; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: throws DotenvException; no Dotenv instance returned
pseudocode: TEST TC05 load missing file exception

scenarios.description: load() with missing .env file and ignoreIfMissing() suppresses exception and returns empty Dotenv
scenarios.precondition: Use a directory without .env; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a DotenvImpl whose entries(filter null) contains only system environment variables

scenarios.description: load() with malformed line in .env and ignoreIfMalformed() suppresses exception and skips malformed entries
scenarios.precondition: Create .env containing one valid KV and one malformed line; no stubs or mocks
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a DotenvImpl whose entries(filter non-null).size() == 1 and get(validKey)==validValue
